description: CompositionBlue and red striped FC Barcelona team jersey for men made of 100% polyester, has a round neck, short sleeves, UNICEF logo printed on the back, applique on the sleeve and team logo appliquéd on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowRemove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wetCool iron, but do not iron on designDo not dry cleanAuthentic FCB merchandise from nike for the soccer fan! If your heart beats for the Barcelona team, then this jersey is a must-have in your collection. Team this with shorts and soccer cleats for the ultimate look and feel of the game.
